habitat: Mediterranean to India; ancient crop of Egypt and South Asia.
traditionalUsesEn: Culinary spice and leafy green; traditional galactagogue and digestive bitter.
traditionalUsesDe: Küchengewürz und Blattgemüse; traditionell milchbildend und verdauungsbitter.
preparation: Sprouted or cooked seeds; methi leaves; teas and powders.
cautions: May lower blood sugar—caution with diabetes drugs. Maple-like body odor at high intake. Pregnancy medicinal doses: advice.
historicalNotes: Found in Tutankhamun’s tomb; name means Greek hay.
habitatDe: Mittelmeergebiet zu Indien; ancient crop von Ägypten und Südasien.
preparationDe: Sprouted oder gekocht Samen; methi Blätter; teas und powders.
cautionsDe: May lower Blutzucker—caution mit diabetes drugs. Maple-like body odor at high intake. Schwangerschaft medicinal doses: advice.
historicalNotesDe: Found in Tutankhamun’s tomb; name means Greek hay.
